query: WITH RECURSIVE cohort(id, root_deleted_at, depth) AS ( SELECT b.id, b.deleted_at, 0 FROM blocks b WHERE b.id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?1)) AND b.deleted_at IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT b.id, c.root_deleted_at, c.depth + 1 FROM blocks b INNER JOIN cohort c ON b.parent_id = c.id WHERE b.deleted_at = c.root_deleted_at AND c.depth < 100 ) UPDATE blocks SET deleted_at = NULL WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cohort) AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
